name: Pub/Sub to Iceberg (BigLake REST catalog) — streaming
description: Reads JSON events from a Pub/Sub subscription and streams them into an Apache Iceberg table via the BigLake Iceberg REST catalog.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.label: GCP project id
parameters.helpText: Project that owns the BigLake catalog (x-goog-user-project).

parameters.name: catalog
parameters.label: Catalog / bucket name
parameters.helpText: BigLake Iceberg catalog name; equals the GCS bucket name in single-bucket mode.

parameters.name: commit_seconds
parameters.label: Commit interval seconds
parameters.helpText: Iceberg snapshot commit cadence; drives consumer freshness.
